title: Irish Soda Bread Gratin
description: A twist on traditional Irish soda bread, this gratin combines the comforting flavors of Ireland with a creamy, tangy topping.

ingredients.name: Tangy Cream
ingredients.notes: mix of sour cream and buttermilk

instructions: Cut the Irish soda bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the tangy cream and grated cheddar cheese.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange half of the bread cubes.
Pour the tangy cream mixture evenly over the bread.
Top with the remaining bread cubes.
Dot the top with melted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the bread is toasted.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped chives, if using.
